title: Invoice

pending.note: Marked as paid — the confirmation receipt goes to the customer once the clearance window passes (due {{when}} UTC). Unmark before then to silently revert; nothing has been sent.
pending.unmarkConfirm: Unmark this payment? Nothing has been sent to the customer — the invoice quietly returns to unpaid.
pending.receiptNotSent: Payment confirmed, but the receipt could not be sent — use “Email invoice” to send it now.
pending.manualNote: Marked paid by {{method}} — awaiting confirmation that the money arrived. This does NOT auto-confirm; confirm it below when the payment lands.
pending.confirmReceivedConfirm: Confirm this payment arrived? The invoice becomes confirmed-paid and the receipt is sent to the customer.

liveNote: This invoice reflects the job card's current estimate — extra authorised work updates it under the same number until it's paid.
paidLocked: This invoice is paid and locked. Only an admin can unlock it for corrections.
unlockConfirm: Unlock this paid invoice for corrections? The action is recorded in the audit trail, and the invoice must be marked paid again afterwards.

email.subject: Invoice {{number}} from {{garage}}
email.body: Please find attached invoice {{number}} from {{garage}} for {{total}}.

datePaid.label: Date paid (on the document)
datePaid.error: Could not save the paid date.

dateIssued.label: Date issued (on the document)
dateIssued.error: Could not save the issue date.
